result: The data has been cleaned and preprocessed according to the specifications. The partnership/marital status was harmonised across waves 6 (age 19), 8 (age 25), and 9 (age 32). Collapsed harmonised variables (`partnr19`, `partnr25`, `partnr32`) and detailed adult versions (`partnradu25`, `partnradu32`) were created, mapping source categories and missing-value codes to the standard scheme. The final dataset containing the ID variable (`NSID`) and these derived variables was saved to `data/output/cleaned_data.csv`.
